name: code-ops
description: Adaptive, multi-agent engineering workflows for any codebase: a broad engineering suite, a privacy/anonymity & OpSec specialization, and a verification-first rigor suite for proven bugs and enforced quality. Developer-in-the-loop, shared conventions, behavior-preserving.

plugins.name: code-ops-suite
plugins.description: General engineering: audit, security/privacy threat assessment, remediation, feature discovery & build, performance, tests, dependencies, PR review, doc alignment, onboarding, and code normalization.

plugins.name: privacy-opsec-suite
plugins.description: Privacy/anonymity & OpSec specialization: anonymity threat model, anonymous sessions, Tor/proxy egress + leak prevention, metadata minimization, fingerprinting & traffic-analysis resistance, supply-chain trust, opsec hardening, leak incident response, and an opsec PR gate.

plugins.name: rigor
plugins.description: Verification-first: find real bugs (proven with repros), validate the test suite (flaky + mutation testing), lock behavior with characterization safety nets, fix at root cause with a regression guard, close inconsistencies with enforcement, and ship measured improvements. Evidence tiers, disconfirmation pass, prove-it-or-don't.

plugins.name: researcher
plugins.description: Code-grounded research: ground in the codebase (or given materials), gather external knowledge, and propose improvements, design briefs, library evaluations, and new ideas. Every claim cited and tiered; local-first with disclosed, fail-closed egress. Proposes and hands implementation to the other suites.
